CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR(255), s2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT greatest(s1, (SELECT MAX(value) FROM additional_strings)) FROM test_strings;
SELECT s1, s2, greatest(s1, s2) AS max_value FROM test_strings WHERE s1 IS NOT NULL AND s2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT greatest(s1, (SELECT MAX(s2) FROM test_strings)) AS overall_max FROM test_strings;
CREATE VIEW max_strings AS SELECT greatest(s1, s2) AS max_value FROM test_strings;
SELECT greatest(s1, s2) FROM test_strings WHERE s1 <> 'banana' AND s2 <> 'banana';
CREATE TABLE joined_test (id INT, s1 VARCHAR(255), s2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT j.id, greatest(j.s1, t.s2) AS max_value FROM joined_test j JOIN test_strings t ON j.id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT greatest(s1, (SELECT s2 FROM test_strings WHERE s1 = 'apple')) FROM test_strings;
